recommendations.title: Ae Fond Kiss...
recommendations.overview: A young man upsets his Punjabi family when he falls in love with an Irish schoolteacher.

recommendations.title: I, Daniel Blake
recommendations.overview: A middle aged carpenter, who requires state welfare after injuring himself, is joined by a single mother in a similar scenario.

recommendations.title: Jimmy's Hall
recommendations.overview: Jimmy Gralton returns from New York and reopens his beloved community hall, only to meet opposition from the local parish.

recommendations.title: Looking for Eric
recommendations.overview: A man trying to put his life back on track gets some advice from an unexpected benefactor -- the ex-footballer Eric Cantona.

recommendations.title: My Name Is Joe
recommendations.overview: Two thirtysomethings, unemployed former alcoholic Joe and community health worker Sarah, start a romantic relationship in one of the toughest Glasgow neighbourhoods.

recommendations.title: Sweet Sixteen
recommendations.overview: Determined to have a normal family life once his mother gets out of prison, a Scottish teenager from a tough background sets out to raise the money for a home.

recommendations.title: Route Irish
recommendations.overview: A private security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

recommendations.title: The Angels' Share
recommendations.overview: Narrowly avoiding jail, new dad Robbie vows to turn over a new leaf. A visit to a whisky distillery inspires him and his mates to seek a way out of their hopeless lives.

recommendations.title: Sorry We Missed You
recommendations.overview: Ricky and his family have been fighting an uphill struggle against debt since the 2008 financial crash. An opportunity to wrestle back some independence appears with a shiny new van and the chance to run a franchise as a self-employed delivery driver

recommendations.title: Land and Freedom
recommendations.overview: David Carr is a British Communist who is unemployed. In 1936, when the Spanish Civil War begins, he decides to fight for the Republican side, a coalition of liberals, communists and anarchists, so he joins the POUM militia and witnesses firsthand the
